content.body: So far so good!  We've been using ShipStation for about a month, and the warehouse loves it!

classification.summary: Organic Cotton Plus is satisfied with ShipStation after one month of use and reports positive reception from their warehouse team.

content.body:
Ship station is so great. I love how it incorporates all the tools I need to fill an order, prepare an order for delivery and ship. Its connection with Shopify is seamless. It is a huge time saver and I would recommend it to any small business.
www.tinyfrockshop.com

classification.summary: Small business owner praising ShipStation for seamless Shopify integration and time-saving order fulfillment capabilities.

content.body:
Our business has been growing steadily and earlier this year we decided to look into external fulfillment services.
We initially decided on a large scale operation with warehouses all over the world. This quickly became a nightmare, horrible customer service, multiple shipping mistakes, high prices, etc. etc.
While looking for a change we came across fulfillrite and I reached out to Charlie. From that initial call until today everything has been smooth. Charlie has always been available to help with issues and explain everything in detail. In some ways other than losing a bunch of money I am glad that we went with a large company first, it has only solidified our decision to move to fulfillrite.
I would recommend this company to anyone out there looking for a fulfillment house with real people answering the phones, affordable prices, and a strong sense of customer service.

classification.summary: Merchant switched from a large multinational fulfillment provider due to poor service and high costs, and is praising Fulfillrite for affordable pricing, responsive customer service, and personalized support from their account manager Charlie.

content.body: Fulfillrite has made my life super easy. I can easily keep track of shipments and inventory and works super smoothly with Shopify The team is always there to answer question.

classification.summary: Merchant is satisfied with Fulfillrite's ease of use, inventory tracking, shipment management, and Shopify integration, plus responsive customer support.

content.body:
I can not speak more highly of Fulfillrite. Combined with Shopify, they make running an online business impossibly easy by handling the tediousness of fulfilment so you can focus exclusively on your sales and customer service.
The Fulfillrite app integrates seamlessly with Shopify. My orders were always shipped quickly, anywhere in the world, with the most affordable rates I could find. I am a very satisfied customer, and recommend them to anyone.

classification.summary: Spartan Naturals is highly satisfied with Fulfillrite's seamless Shopify integration, fast worldwide shipping, and affordable rates, and recommends the service to others.

content.body: We were a little hesitant at first- we ship usually by USPS.com - but WOW were we wrong.  No turning back now- I couldn't imagine our business without ShipStation.  The invoices we get that print out are perfect with each shipment, the data on our customers, tracking, notifying our customers automatically, easy to print a return label - A+ just brilliant!

classification.summary: West Coast Goalkeeping is highly satisfied with ShipStation's invoicing, customer data management, tracking, automated notifications, and return label functionality after switching from USPS.com.

content.body: Our company has gone through many different third party shipping programs and I can say that we are very happy with ShipStation. Not only is ShipStation easy and friendly to use, but it saves us so much time in shipping high volume of orders. I personally love the fact that it's so organized. It definitely helps us get through each day processing orders a lot faster than before. We are highly satisfied with ShipStation. :)

classification.summary: Long-time ShipStation customer praising the platform's ease of use, time-saving capabilities for high-volume order processing, and organized interface.

content.body: Fulfillrite is a wonderful service that has taken the biggest headache of my business out of my hands: Fulfillment. Not only does there app flawlessly integrate with my shopify account, their core fulfillment business is excellent. Fulfillrite automatically receives my orders from Shopify, processes the orders quickly, and ships them out all over the world at minimal cost and with no effort on my end. Overall, using Fulfillrite has been great!

classification.summary: Merchant is highly satisfied with Fulfillrite's seamless Shopify integration, fast order processing, and cost-effective global shipping capabilities.

content.body: We've been using ShipStation since a couple months after we started using StitchLabs. Together they're amazing! I can't believe we used to do this however we used to do this. I'm able to have my sister 800 miles away handle all of our retail shipping, it's been amazing. Don't waste any time not having this app!

classification.summary: Merchant is very satisfied with ShipStation integrated with StitchLabs, praising the ability to manage retail shipping remotely and expressing they wouldn't go back to their previous workflow.

content.body: While the Fulfillrite integrates seamlessly with Shopify, it is so much more than an app. Fulfillrite invited me to try their service when I didn't even know what a fulfillment center was. They taught me everything I needed to know about order fulfillment with extremely personal service. They're fast, affordable, and accessible. Most importantly, with fulfillment out of the way I am able to spend all of my time on the most important part of my business- the products themselves. Fulfillrite offers a level of organization and efficiency I could never have built in-house, I don't know how I ran my business without them!

classification.summary: Satisfied merchant praising Fulfillrite's seamless Shopify integration, educational onboarding, affordability, speed, and ability to free up time to focus on product development.

author.name: Mexico SIM Card - Stay in touch while traveling to Mexico
author.company: Mexico SIM Card - Stay in touch while traveling to Mexico

content.body:
At first I was hesitant to use ShipStation because of the price, I tried it for free for 30 days and now I pay happily the 65$ a month for having my Shopify store, eBay and Amazon account linked to ShipStation.  It cut drastically the shipping time and I now enjoy doing shipping.
VIncent

classification.summary: Merchant overcame initial price hesitation with ShipStation's free trial and now happily pays $65/month for unified multi-channel shipping management that significantly reduced processing time.

content.body:
ShipStation has simplified my business and my life!  Bottom line, if you ship product and are looking for a service to help manage your shipping needs (sync with UPS, USPS, FedEX...and create labels), do yourself a favor and pony up for ShipStation!
I would also like to add that their support is fantastic!

classification.summary: Merchant is satisfied with ShipStation's ability to simplify shipping management across multiple carriers and praises their customer support.

content.body:
I don't usually leave a comment unless I am overwhelmed with something that is worthwhile spending time to share with...  well.  ShipStaion is..
I have researched pretty much every option available in the market. Here are the main reasons why you want to adapt their service so that you can find more time of yourself or spend more important things that only you can do...
Perhaps, go to Santa Monica beach with your family. :)
1. None of softwares are perfect; however, ShipStation support-staffs understand the means of excellent service. They WILL be available when a problem happens. - that is all it counts in business.
2. They work well with "other" associated support companies such as StitchLabs, Carrier services, etc.  They don't 'dump' problems to others, but take it seriously as if it is their own problem.
3. The results by signing up with their service extends far more value than the committed monthly fee. Our company has saved up to 30-40% of labor time comparing from where we were without Shipstation. It has virtually eliminated the most of human errors and our inventories are now well managed.
HIGHLY RECOMMENDED. - Don't waste your time searching somebody else.
D.

classification.summary: Established merchant highly recommends ShipStation for its responsive support, integration ecosystem, and significant labor efficiency gains (30-40% time savings), emphasizing that reliable service quality matters more than finding a perfect solution.

content.body: Fulfillrite is a wonderful company to work with. The integration between Shopify and Fulfillrite is always seamless, and the staff at Fulfillrite are always willing to answer our questions and provide help when needed. Any time an order is placed through our shop, it is fulfilled within 1 business day by Fulfillrite. We really could not ask for anything more out of this app.

classification.summary: Chivalry is highly satisfied with Fulfillrite's seamless Shopify integration, responsive customer service, and fast 1-day fulfillment.

content.body: Charlie and the team at Fulfillrite are always extremely helpful and on top of it!  Their app integrating with Shopify really makes the entire experience as simple and stress-free as possible.  It's great to have peace of mind when it comes to fulfillment and spend that time focusing on all the other things that come with running a shop.

classification.summary: Fulfillrite merchant praising the company's customer service, Shopify app integration, and peace of mind provided by their fulfillment services.

content.body:
We LOVE ShipStation and we especially love it in tandem with Stitchlabs (http://apps.shopify.com/stitch-labs) .  Shipstation is a stable, highly configurable, intuitive, robust, platform that *WAY* more than pays for itself in the time it saves (not to mention discounted USPS rates).
If you're copying and pasting address info, signing into multiple shipping sites, copying and pasting tracking numbers, and wondering if there's a quicker way, you've just found it.  Takes a little bit of time to set up your filters and rules, but it was time well spent.  Shipping time is *easily* halved (if not more) after setup.
I mentioned Stitchlabs.  These two integrations have completely changed the way we run our online business and I can't imagine our business without these two apps.  Shipstation and Stitchlabs work seamlessly together and pass all the important info all the way back to Shopify.  Huge power when combining these apps: reporting, inventory tracking, light bookkeeping, and shipping all dramatically improved.
Added bonus about using both integrations: it counts as ONE channel in Shipstation (even if you have multiple channels tied to Stitchlabs).
Highly recommended!

classification.summary: Merchant is highly satisfied with ShipStation's configurability and efficiency gains, particularly when integrated with Stitchlabs, and credits both platforms with transforming their business operations.

content.body:
Before using ShipStation we dreaded spikes in orders... ok, maybe dreaded isn't the right word (because ^ orders means ^ dollars), but we were delayed 1-2 days in getting orders out when they came in in waves.
Now that we have ShipStation, we don't use it every day, but it helps us stay on track when we get hit by a big wave of orders and that, on it's own, is more than enough for us to justify keeping it around.
For some people it's an every day solution, for us, it's our muscle (and we love it).

classification.summary: Merchant uses ShipStation to manage order spikes and delays, eliminating 1-2 day processing backlogs during high-volume periods and considers it essential to their operations.

content.body: Before the ShipStation app, I was spending hours putting together labels. This has sped up my process immensely, and it lets me look at sales reports!

classification.summary: Merchant praises ShipStation for dramatically reducing label-creation time and enabling sales report visibility.

content.body: Great customer service. They want you to succeed at shipping your product efficiently.

classification.summary: Positive review of ShipStation: Great customer service. They want you to succeed at shipping your product efficiently.

content.body:
Fulfillrite is not only an excellent "pick and pack" service center, but the integration with Shopify is flawless. In fact, you don't even see the integration, its all behind the scenes. You'll be contacted by a representative who walks you through the setup and logistics. There are no settings that get added to Shopify but rather a separate web portal to access the Fulfillrite control panel.
So far it's been working great!

classification.summary: Merchant is satisfied with Fulfillrite's pick and pack service and particularly pleased with the seamless Shopify integration and responsive onboarding support.
